raw_text: carlos prakash del valle o p santa maría de la cabeza, 37 esc.2, 20b, 28045, madrid, spain. í] +971 552773086 / +34 618903913, +34 91 5285541 sa carlos.prakash.cpdv@gmail.com place & date of birth: madrid, spain. 21/12/1991 summary - industrial engineer (mechanical field), graduated at polytechnic university of madrid. - experienced as an operations manager at a sea water desalination plant in united arab emirates. - experienced as a commissioning engineer at waste water and sea water treatment plants. - skilled in process and operations, team management and p&id and drawings understanding. work experience jun 2015 - process engineer. o&m of desalination plants acciona agua, s.a. present > aug 15 - present (expat): operations manager at the fujairah f1 seawater ro plant (united arab emirates) of 30 migd of potable water production. role and duties: e monitoring of the process variables of the different units of the plant and water quality analysis. e root-cause analysis of the variations/disturbances in the process (troubleshooting). e involvement in the plant shutdown program and decision making. e knowledge in process and industrial equipment: reverse osmosis (ro), co, production, pumps, compressors, heat exchangers and energy recovery systems. e preparing the monthly reports of operation and water quality, including the production data, kpi, equipment and process units availability and recommendations for process optimization. e management and training of the operation team: set their shift schedule, holidays and task assignments regarding the plant priorities and job position. e use of simulation programs such as ds2 (toray) and rosa (dow) for reverse osmosis systems (membranes). e management of the chemical inventory and technical contact with suppliers. e work experience abroad (u.a.e.): interaction with the clients, attending meetings and staff dealing all in english. e technical review of the p&id and control philosophy for the detailed engineering of the modification of the high pressure header that feeds the ro systems. e involvement in the commissioning stage (august-november 2015). > jun 15-jul 15: tordera desalination plant (girona): support in the o&m of the plant as a deputy plant manager. meanwhile, assistance in some commissioning documentation. aug 2014- commissioning engineer (internship) acciona agua, s.a. jul 2015 e butarque waste water treatment plant (madrid): supervising the equipment installation on-site and do dry and wet equipment tests. e carmona wwtp (sevilla): assistance on-site in the commissioning documentation, such as equipment submittals and manuals. e los tajos wwtp (costa rica): assistance in the o&m manual. load the plant equipment and the preventive maintenance routines in neptuno workwater program. e organize, translate and edit all the commissioning documentation for its standardization: commissioning management plan, technical instructions and equipment test sheets. jan 2014- research in efficiency of gears kth university may 2014 efficiency tests using the fzg gear test rig for the master thesis thermal modelling of an fzg test gearbox, necessary to compare the project simulation model to experimental results. education 2009-2014 b.sc./m.sc. in mechanical engineering polytechnic university of madrid, spain school of advanced industrial engineering of madrid. gpa: 7,7/10 (top 15%) 2013-2014 m.sc. in mechanical engineering kth royal institute of technology, sweden school of industrial engineering and management erasmus exchange student. fifth degree year & master thesis thesis grade: a languages english advanced level 2013: b2 course at kth university. stockholm, sweden 2009: intermediate level certificate at official school of languages. madrid french basic level swedish basic level 2013: al course at kth university. stockholm, sweden computer skills microsoft advanced skills in word, excel, power point
